name: Auto Correct Capitals Misspellings

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description: Added list item detection for asterisk and sub lists

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description:
# Release Notes
### Exclusion List Improvements
Words added to the exclusion list are now correctly ignored across all autocorrect scenarios (list items, sentence starts, and word corrections).

### Trigger Character Correction
Fixed an issue where automatic character insertions incorrectly triggered corrections. Now corrections only occur on manually typed trigger characters.

### Custom Abbreviation Support
Introduced a configurable abbreviation list that prevents incorrect capitalization following common abbreviations like `e.g.` or `i.e.`. Changes to abbreviations now take immediate effect without restarting Obsidian.

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description:
- **Caching for Protected Block Checks**  
  Expensive checks for protected areas (code, math, YAML frontmatter) are now cached so they are performed only once per editor-change event.

- **List Item Improvements**  
  Added support for correcting the first word in numbered lists (e.g. "1. hello") in addition to bullet lists.

- **Combined Protected Block Detection**  
  Integrated checks for YAML frontmatter, fenced codeblocks, inline code, and math expressions into a single, more efficient function.

- **Performance Enhancements**  
  Overall optimizations lead to a smoother typing experience in Obsidian.

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description:
**Release Notes - Version 1.0.8**

- **optional Setting: Capitalize Sentence Beginning**
When the optional "Capitalize Sentence Beginnings" setting is enabled, the plugin detects the start of the last sentence in a line and converts its first letter to uppercase if it was typed in lowercase. This ensures that sentences maintain consistent formatting throughout your notes.
~ thanks to chrisgrieser for the suggestion!

- **Mathblock Protection:** 
 The plugin now checks whether the cursor is in a math block (inline with `$...$` or block with `$$...$$`) and skips automatic corrections in this case.

- **Optimized code block detection:** 
 The code block check is now only executed if a correction is actually to be made. This eliminates unnecessary overhead.

- Targeted early exits:** 
 The autocorrect functions now perform their own checks (code and math block) before changes are made. This improves performance for frequent editor events.

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description:
**Release Notes (Version 1.0.7):**

- **List Item Capitalization:**  
  Added a new optional feature that automatically capitalizes the first letter of the first word in list items (lines starting with "- "). It also corrects the second letter if it is mistakenly uppercase (e.g., "- HAllo" becomes "- Hallo").

- **Improved Enter Key Handling:**  
  When the Enter key is pressed, the plugin now always checks the previous line for corrections—ensuring proper auto-correction in lists, quotes, and other cases.

- **Performance Enhancements:**  
  Introduced early abort conditions and moved trigger characters and regex patterns to global constants for caching, reducing unnecessary processing and improving overall efficiency.

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description: This Plugin does not correct mistyped capital characters inside codeblocks or inline codeblocks anymore

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description: Added a list in the Preferences menu to add words to exclude from the autocorrect feature and fixed a bug.

releases.author: Ummler
releases.description:
### Version 1.0.4

- Initial release of the Auto Correct Plugin.
- Automatically corrects words with the first two letters in uppercase.
- Corrections happen after typing a space, punctuation, or hitting enter.
releases.name: Auto Correct Capitals Misspellings
